scripts.dev: npm run build -w @habitacion/domain && concurrently -n api,web -c cyan,green "npm run dev:api" "npm run dev:web"
scripts.build: npm run build -w @habitacion/domain && npm run build -w @habitacion/web && npm run build -w @habitacion/api
scripts.test: npm run build -w @habitacion/domain && npm run test -w @habitacion/domain && npm run test -w @habitacion/api && npm run test -w @habitacion/web
scripts.test:coverage: npm run build -w @habitacion/domain && npm run test:coverage -w @habitacion/domain && npm run test:coverage -w @habitacion/api && npm run test:coverage -w @habitacion/web
scripts.check: npm run lint && npm run test && npm run build && npm run e2e
